name: Patient 17
history: In long-term relationship with Amelia who has demanding schedule. Sarah feels isolated, does most household tasks without discussing resentment. Childhood separation experiences.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: If I express my needs, I'll be abandoned like in childhood.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm destined to feel alone even in relationships.
coping_strategies: Silent resentment, over-functioning in household, seeking contact.
situation: Not receiving communication from partner during day and attempting to make contact.
auto_thought: She doesn't care about me. I'm alone in this relationship.
behavior: Attempt to contact partner while feeling neglected.
